hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.jsx|*.js) npx eslint --fix "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.env|*.env.*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Editing .env is blocked by a project hook \u2014 it holds live backend URLs"}}';; esac; }
